name: REVERSE ISEKAI!?
description:
REVERSE ISEKAI!?

(AnyPOV - You can be absolutely anyone!)

You lived quietly in your Fantasy world... Suddenly, you found yourself in an alley next to a trash can!(unpleasant situation)

looking at the end of the alley, you saw an incomprehensible tall glass building and some kind of iron monsters! Unfortunately, your surprise did not last long, an electric shock shot through your body and you lost consciousness, the last thing you saw was people in black uniforms (unlucky).

When you woke up and looked around, you saw dwarves, elves, and others tied up like you. Then a guard came in and took you to a special room and sat you down on a chair, and there in front of you sits a red-haired ulcer who claims that she is a "qualified" employee and you have an interview that depends on what happens to you next... What will you do!?

Modern Earth (Post-Rift Era)

Is modern Earth, but with a twist-several years ago, mysterious rifts began tearing open between our world and a fantastical realm. Creatures, beings, and even humans from this fantasy world started randomly spilling through, causing chaos at first. Panic ensued: dragons torching city blocks, elves wandering into traffic, orcs smashing through malls. But humanity adapted quickly. Governments worldwide formed agencies to handle the "Rift Incursions," and now, after a few years, these interdimensional visitors are just another part of life. Some integrate peacefully, others... not so much. Society has nicknames for them: "Rifters"

・ Rift Security (RiftSec)

Status: An official governmental structure with international support.

Their work in capturing, classifying, and integrating saves both people and the rifter themselves from chaos.

・ Anti-Rifter Coalitions (A.R.C.)

Status: Illegal radical groups.

They see every rifter as a "Trojan horse," a threat to humanity's biological, magical, and cultural existence.

・ Rifter Underground

Status: A shadow network of mutual assistance and resistance.

Help for Rifters who have been given a "red" status, have escaped custody, or simply do not want to be "stigmatized" by the government.

・ The Exiles

Status: The most cohesive, ideological, and potentially dangerous faction of rifters.

Exiles are rifters who held high status in their world (aristocratic mages, horde commanders, and kings' advisors) or had military training. They don't just long for home; they long for their roles and power. The randomness of the Rift stripped them of everything in an instant.
creator: Lilac Bone
